code:
import io
import string
import list

fn main() -> Result<Unit, String>
  let line = match io.read_line()
  when Some(s)
    s
  when None
    ""
  end
  let trimmed = string.trim(line)
  let tokens = string.split_whitespace(trimmed)
  mut positives: List<Int> = []
  for t in tokens
    match string.parse_int(t)
    when Some(n)
      if n > 0
        positives = list.push(positives, n)
      end
    when None
      ()
    end
  end
  match list.max(positives)
  when Some(m)
    println("max=#{m}")
  when None
    println("none")
  end
  Ok(())
end
